qwen3-lora-003-hard.label: Caatuu Czech Qwen3 1.7B LoRA 003 Hard
qwen3-lora-003-hard.intended_use: General Czech assistant and spelling checks.
notes: Legacy/deprecated: kept for compatibility until the curriculum LoRA GGUF replacements are published.
Source is the merged Hugging Face export from the ML workspace.

cstinyllama-1.2b-base.label: BUT-FIT CSTinyLlama 1.2B Base
cstinyllama-1.2b-base.replacement_status: Keep only as an unfine-tuned baseline.
notes: Legacy/deprecated raw Czech base model, not Caatuu fine-tuned.
Use as the first Czech-native comparison target before deciding whether to train a LoRA.

cstinyllama-1.2b-planet-wordnet-002-copy.label: Caatuu Planet Word Net CSTinyLlama 1.2B LoRA 003 Clean SFT
cstinyllama-1.2b-planet-wordnet-002-copy.intended_use: Planet of Word Net: generate one natural Czech sentence using the selected word or a natural Czech inflection of it.
cstinyllama-1.2b-planet-wordnet-002-copy.replacement_status: Pending curriculum word-sentence LoRA GGUF publication.
notes: Legacy/deprecated CSTinyLlama LoRA trained with clean sentence-generation examples and anti-meta-language filtering.
Use with prompt format: Cíl: WORD newline Napiš jednu krátkou běžnou českou větu. Nevysvětluj. newline Věta:
Relaxed local benchmark passed 391/420 one-sentence Czech outputs when natural inflection is accepted.

cstinyllama-1.2b-translation-cs-en-001.label: Caatuu Czech to English CSTinyLlama 1.2B LoRA 001
cstinyllama-1.2b-translation-cs-en-001.intended_use: Translate one simple Czech sentence into simple English for Caatuu learning activities.
notes: Legacy/deprecated CSTinyLlama translation LoRA trained from the curated bilingual Caatuu corpus.
Deprecated because app testing showed weaker Czech-to-English quality than expected.
Smoke benchmark passed 80/80 Czech-to-English generation checks with average similarity 0.9943.

qwen3-1.7b-translation-cs-en-001.label: Caatuu Czech to English Qwen3 1.7B LoRA 001
qwen3-1.7b-translation-cs-en-001.intended_use: Optional Generative mode: translate one simple Czech sentence into simple English for Caatuu learning activities.
notes: On-demand only: excluded from initial setup and downloaded when a learner chooses a generative activity.

Qwen3 translation LoRA trained from the curated bilingual Caatuu corpus using the chat-template SFT path, then continued once over train_all.jsonl for the release artifact after validation was complete.
Use with prompt format: Translate this Czech sentence into simple English. Return only the English sentence. newline Czech: SENTENCE newline English:

cstinyllama-1.2b-czech-word-sentence-001.label: Caatuu Czech Word Sentence CSTinyLlama 1.2B LoRA 001
cstinyllama-1.2b-czech-word-sentence-001.intended_use: Optional Generative mode: given one Czech target word, generate one short ordinary Czech sentence for Word World.
notes: On-demand only: excluded from initial setup and downloaded when a learner chooses Word World Generative mode.
Curriculum utility LoRA trained from the curated child-safe Caatuu corpus.
Relaxed smoke benchmark passed 74/80; all 80 outputs were Czech one-sentence responses with no meta-language.
